scripts.build: pnpm --filter @backtest/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @backtest/frontend build && pnpm --filter @backtest/admin build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @backtest/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @backtest/frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter @backtest/admin typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @backtest/api lint && pnpm --filter @backtest/frontend lint && pnpm --filter @backtest/admin lint
scripts.deploy:frontend: pnpm --filter @backtest/frontend build && cd services/frontend && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=backtest-frontend
scripts.deploy:admin: pnpm --filter @backtest/admin build && cd services/admin && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=backtest-admin
scripts.deploy: pnpm deploy:backend && pnpm deploy:frontend && pnpm deploy:admin
